title: rubus × semigranulatus
intro: Rubus × semigranulatus, also known as the Semigranular Blackberry, is a hybrid species of the Rubus genus, combining characteristics of both the European blackberry (Rubus fruticosus) and the thimbleberry (Rubus parviflorus). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The Semigranular Blackberry has been associated with several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Rubus × semigranulatus is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
